title: Register New Patient with Symptoms
description: The system shall accept patient symptoms during registration and add the patient to the evaluation queue for assessment.
rationale: This requirement ensures that patients are properly registered with their symptoms, allowing them to be prioritized and evaluated appropriately in the healthcare system.
business_value: Improves patient flow and efficiency by ensuring timely assessment and treatment based on symptom severity.

source.description: As a triage nurse, I need to register a new patient with their symptoms so that they can be added to the queue for evaluation.

acceptance_criteria: The system shall display a registration form for new patients.
The system shall accept input of patient symptoms during the registration process.
The system shall add the newly registered patient to an evaluation queue.
preconditions: A triage nurse is logged into the system with appropriate permissions.
There are available slots in the evaluation queue.
postconditions: The new patient's symptom information is stored in the system.
The new patient is listed as a pending evaluation in the queue.
functional_constraints: Symptom input must be validated against predefined criteria to ensure accuracy and relevance.
Patient information must be securely stored and accessible only by authorized personnel.
security_requirements: All patient data shall be encrypted both at rest and in transit.
Access to the registration system is restricted to authorized triage nurses and medical staff.

non_functional_requirements.performance: The registration process must complete within 30 seconds under normal conditions.
non_functional_requirements.availability: The system must be available 99.5% of the time during peak hours.
non_functional_requirements.scalability: The system shall handle up to 1,000 new patient registrations per hour without significant performance degradation.
non_functional_requirements.usability: Error messages shall be clear and actionable; the interface shall be intuitive with minimal form fields.

edge_cases: What if the triage nurse enters invalid symptom information?
How should the system handle a situation where no symptoms are provided?
What happens if the evaluation queue is full?
What if multiple patients are registered simultaneously?

interfaces.name: Symptom Validation API
interfaces.description: The registration process must validate symptom input using the Symptom Validation API to ensure accuracy and relevance.

interfaces.name: Patient Database
interfaces.description: The system must store new patient information in the Patient Database, including their symptoms.

interfaces.name: Evaluation Queue System
interfaces.description: The newly registered patient must be added to the Evaluation Queue using the Evaluation Queue Management System.

test_cases.description: Register a new patient with valid symptoms.
test_cases.expected_result: Patient is successfully added to the evaluation queue and symptom information stored.

test_cases.description: Attempt to register a new patient without providing any symptoms.
test_cases.expected_result: Error message displayed indicating that symptoms are required.

test_cases.description: Simulate simultaneous registration of multiple patients.
test_cases.expected_result: All patients are successfully added to the evaluation queue in a timely manner.
